news.title:
Goldman Sachs retains Buy on Solar Industries India with ₹18,900 TP, citing 44% rise in ammonium nitrate prices.
Coal India's 26% cost surge supports realizations; strong mining and coal demand boosts earnings visibility.
news.summary:
Goldman Sachs retains Buy on Solar Industries India with ₹18,900 TP, citing 44% rise in ammonium nitrate prices.
Coal India's 26% cost surge supports realizations; strong mining and coal demand boosts earnings visibility.

news.title: Goldman Sachs recommends buying Solar Industries with a target price of 18,900.

news.title:
Nuvama highlights BEL, Data Patterns, and Solar Industries as top defence picks with 6%-43% upside.
Focus shifts to execution quality; BEL, HAL face delays, while DPIL and SOIL show stronger execution.
news.summary:

news.title:
Astra Microwave, Solar Industries, and Zen Technologies benefit from India's Rs 2.38 lakh crore defence approvals.
Astra leads in radar/missile systems, Solar excels in artillery/missiles, and Zen drives UAV/anti-drone tech growth.
news.summary:
Astra Microwave, Solar Industries, and Zen Technologies benefit from India's Rs 2.38 lakh crore defence approvals.
Astra leads in radar/missile systems, Solar excels in artillery/missiles, and Zen drives UAV/anti-drone tech growth.

news.title:
Solar Industries India Ltd disclosed under SEBI SAST regulations; key transactions on 09/03/2026.
Promoters sold shares as gifts; Sohan Devi Nand Lal Nuwal Family Trust acquired shares.
news.summary:
Solar Industries India Ltd disclosed under SEBI SAST regulations; key transactions on 09/03/2026.

news.title:
Defence index surged 7%, led by GRSE (+19%), Cochin Shipyard (+15%), and Mazagon Dock (+13.5%). BEL secured ₹6,795 crore contracts.
GRSE FY26 revenue grew 26% YoY; Midhani reported 12.3% YoY growth. Analysts favor BEL, Midhani, and Solar Industries for strong execution.
news.summary:
Defence index surged 7%, led by GRSE (+19%), Cochin Shipyard (+15%), and Mazagon Dock (+13.5%). BEL secured ₹6,795 crore contracts.
GRSE FY26 revenue grew 26% YoY; Midhani reported 12.3% YoY growth. Analysts favor BEL, Midhani, and Solar Industries for strong execution.

news.title:
Solar Industries sees growth in defence orders, driven by a robust ₹18,000 crore order book and geopolitical tensions.
Its defence revenue, up 76% in 9MFY26, is projected to reach 42% of sales by FY28 amid diversification efforts.
news.summary:
Solar Industries sees growth in defence orders, driven by a robust ₹18,000 crore order book and geopolitical tensions.
Its defence revenue, up 76% in 9MFY26, is projected to reach 42% of sales by FY28 amid diversification efforts.

news.title:
West Asia war boosts defence bets; key Indian stocks like BEL, HAL, and Mazagon Dock may benefit from rising military budgets.
BEL and HAL show strong growth with diverse portfolios; Solar Industries and Data Patterns expand globally and in niche markets.
news.summary:
West Asia war boosts defence bets; key Indian stocks like BEL, HAL, and Mazagon Dock may benefit from rising military budgets.
BEL and HAL show strong growth with diverse portfolios; Solar Industries and Data Patterns expand globally and in niche markets.

news.title:
Elara Capital initiates Buy on Solar Industries India with a target price of Rs 15,450.
Cites 25% revenue, 28% earnings CAGR, 66% defence CAGR, and Rs 127bn MoU as growth drivers.
news.summary:

Solar Defence began work on robotics, UAV facility in Nagpur SEZ.
Facility focuses on advanced defence tech, boosting indigenous capabilities.

news.title:
Solar Industries India Ltd surged 3.9%, closing at ₹14,530.70 on 04 Mar.
The rise reflects robust financials and sustained growth, boosting investor confidence.

news.title:
Defence stocks show divergence; PSUs like HAL (-9% YTD) and BDL (-16% YTD) struggle, while private players like Data Patterns (+18% YTD) and Solar Industries (+10% YTD) gain.
Nifty Defence Index gains 4.8% YTD. Analysts highlight elevated valuations, execution challenges, and policy gaps as key factors affecting PSU stocks, favoring private players.
news.summary:
Defence stocks show divergence; PSUs like HAL (-9% YTD) and BDL (-16% YTD) struggle, while private players like Data Patterns (+18% YTD) and Solar Industries (+10% YTD) gain.
Nifty Defence Index gains 4.8% YTD. Analysts highlight elevated valuations, execution challenges, and policy gaps as key factors affecting PSU stocks, favoring private players.

news.title:
India's defence firms like Balu Forge and Solar Industries are leveraging the global 155 mm shell shortage, scaling production and exports.
India's cost-competitive shells, priced $300-$400 vs. $3,000 Western equivalents, position it as a key supplier for NATO-aligned and Asian markets.
news.summary:
India's defence firms like Balu Forge and Solar Industries are leveraging the global 155 mm shell shortage, scaling production and exports.
India's cost-competitive shells, priced $300-$400 vs. $3,000 Western equivalents, position it as a key supplier for NATO-aligned and Asian markets.

news.title:
India's missile boom highlights the crucial role of defence chemicals like propellants and explosives, now mostly produced domestically.
Key players like Solar Industries and Premier Explosives lead in manufacturing missile propellants, explosives, and defence materials, driving long-term growth.
news.summary:
India's missile boom highlights the crucial role of defence chemicals like propellants and explosives, now mostly produced domestically.
Key players like Solar Industries and Premier Explosives lead in manufacturing missile propellants, explosives, and defence materials, driving long-term growth.

news.title:
Solar Industries expects 15% annual growth, with over 20% growth in 3-5 years driven by mining and defense.
Management anticipates 6-7% demand rise in mining products, leading to 10-12% volume and 15% business growth in India.
news.summary:
Solar Industries expects 15% annual growth, with over 20% growth in 3-5 years driven by mining and defense.
Management anticipates 6-7% demand rise in mining products, leading to 10-12% volume and 15% business growth in India.
